character_dossiers.name: Jim
character_dossiers.biography: Received a pistol from Silver, observed Silver's actions, and engaged in dialogue about Silver's changing sides.

character_dossiers.name: Silver
character_dossiers.biography: Directed others during conflict, gave Jim a pistol, and strategized with the group.

character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: Led the group after the attack, coordinated movement to the boats, and shared information about the treasure.

character_dossiers.name: Morgan
character_dossiers.biography: Held a gold piece, participated in the excavation, and engaged in verbal conflict with Silver.

character_dossiers.name: Merry
character_dossiers.biography: Attempted to lead a charge, accused Silver of betrayal, and was killed by musket fire.

character_dossiers.name: Long John
character_dossiers.biography: Fired musket shots, killed Merry, and joined the group after the attack.

character_dossiers.name: Gray
character_dossiers.biography: Participated in the attack, joined the group after the battle, and helped retrieve the treasure.

character_dossiers.name: Ben Gunn
character_dossiers.biography: Discovered the treasure, stored it in a cave, and aided the group in retrieving it.

character_dossiers.name: the doctor
character_dossiers.biography: Organized the group's movement, used a pick-axe to destroy a boat, and coordinated the escape.

character_dossiers.name: the squire
character_dossiers.biography: Guarded the captain while Ben Gunn retrieved the treasure.
